add-multi-line-text-watermark.title: Add Multi-Line Text Watermark to PDF Using FormattedText
add-multi-line-text-watermark.description: Demonstrates creating a multi-line formatted text watermark with Aspose.Pdf.Facades and applying it to every page of a PDF document.

rotate-text-stamp-45-degrees.title: Rotate Text Stamp 45 Degrees in PDF
rotate-text-stamp-45-degrees.description: Demonstrates creating a TextStamp, configuring its appearance, rotating it 45° around its centre, and applying it to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-pdf-page-stamp-as-background.title: Apply PDF Page Stamp as Background to All Pages
apply-pdf-page-stamp-as-background.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to apply the first page of another PDF as a background stamp on every page of a source PDF.

stamp-pdf-with-external-template.title: Stamp PDF with External Template on Specific Page
stamp-pdf-with-external-template.description: Demonstrates how to create a PdfFileStamp from an external PDF template and apply it only to the third page of a PDF document.

add-lower-roman-page-numbers-odd-pages.title: Add Lower‑Roman Page Numbers to Odd Pages
add-lower-roman-page-numbers-odd-pages.description: Demonstrates how to stamp lower‑case Roman numerals as page numbers on only the odd pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

combine-image-text-pdf-stamp.title: Combine Image and Text into a Single PDF Stamp
combine-image-text-pdf-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to create a stamp that contains both a logo image and formatted custom text, configure its appearance, and apply it to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-header-stamp-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Header Stamp to All PDF Pages
add-header-stamp-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate through each page, and add a centered header stamp containing a company name using Aspose.Pdf.

add-footer-date-stamp-to-last-page.title: Add Footer Date Stamp to Last PDF Page
add-footer-date-stamp-to-last-page.description: Shows how to place a footer stamp with the current date (MM-dd-yyyy) on the last page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-rotating-stamps-to-pdf-pages.title: Apply Rotating Stamps to Each PDF Page
apply-rotating-stamps-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates adding a text stamp to every page of a PDF and rotating it based on the page index using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-background-watermark-stamp-to-pdf-pa.title: Add Background Watermark Stamp to Specific PDF Pages
add-background-watermark-stamp-to-pdf-pa.description: Demonstrates how to create a background watermark stamp using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and apply it to pages 2 through 5 of a PDF document.

batch-add-multi-line-watermark-to-pdfs.title: Batch Add Multi‑Line Watermark to PDFs
batch-add-multi-line-watermark-to-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to process a folder of PDF files and apply the same multi‑line watermark stamp to each document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

apply-image-stamp-to-pdfs.title: Apply Image Stamp to PDFs and Save to New Folder
apply-image-stamp-to-pdfs.description: Demonstrates loading PDF files from a directory, applying an image stamp to every page with Aspose.Pdf.Facades, and saving the stamped PDFs to a separate folder while preserving the original file names.

add-disclaimer-stamp-to-first-page.title: Add Disclaimer Stamp to First Page of PDF
add-disclaimer-stamp-to-first-page.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileStamp and Stamp to overlay a disclaimer PDF onto the first page of a target PDF document.

add-translucent-text-watermark-to-pdf-pa.title: Add Translucent Text Watermark to PDF Pages
add-translucent-text-watermark-to-pdf-pa.description: Shows how to create a 50% opaque text stamp and apply it as a watermark on every page of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-rotated-image-stamp-bottom-right.title: Apply Rotated Image Stamp to Bottom Right of PDF Pages
apply-rotated-image-stamp-bottom-right.description: Demonstrates how to add an image stamp rotated 30° to the bottom‑right corner of each page in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-page-number-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add Page Number Stamp to PDF
add-page-number-stamp-to-pdf.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileStamp to add a dynamic page number stamp to each page of a PDF and save the stamped document.

add-footer-stamp-10pt-above-bottom.title: Add Footer Stamp 10 Points Above Bottom Edge
add-footer-stamp-10pt-above-bottom.description: Demonstrates how to place a footer stamp exactly 10 points above the bottom edge of each page by configuring stamp margins with PdfFileStamp.

apply-text-stamp-to-even-pages.title: Apply Text Stamp to Even Pages of a PDF
apply-text-stamp-to-even-pages.description: Shows how to add a text stamp only to even-numbered pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-qr-code-text-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add QR Code and Text Stamp to PDF
add-qr-code-text-stamp-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to place a QR‑code image together with descriptive text on each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades stamping APIs.

apply-stamp-to-specific-pdf-pages.title: Apply Stamp to Specific PDF Pages Using Aspose.Pdf.Facades
apply-stamp-to-specific-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to add a formatted text stamp to pages 1, 5, and 10 of a PDF by directly specifying the page indices with PdfFileMend.

apply-image-stamp-to-pdf.title: Apply Image Stamp to PDF with Overlay Control
apply-image-stamp-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF in memory, generating an image stamp, binding both via streams, setting the stamp to overlay existing content (IsBackground = false), and saving the stamped PDF.

add-transparent-confidential-text-stamp.title: Add Transparent CONFIDENTIAL Text Stamp to Selected PDF Pages
add-transparent-confidential-text-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to place a semi‑transparent CONFIDENTIAL text stamp on specific pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

custom-ttf-font-stamp-pdf.title: Create Branded PDF Stamp with Custom TrueType Font
custom-ttf-font-stamp-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a TrueType font from a file and using it to create a text stamp for branding, which is applied to every page of a PDF document.

add-page-number-stamp-arabic-numerals.title: Add Page Number Stamp with Arabic Numerals
add-page-number-stamp-arabic-numerals.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileStamp facade to add sequential page numbers formatted as Arabic numerals to every page of a PDF document.

batch-apply-rotated-pdf-page-stamp.title: Batch Apply Rotated PDF Page Stamp to PDFs on Network Share
batch-apply-rotated-pdf-page-stamp.description: Shows how to enumerate PDF files in a UNC folder and apply a rotated page from another PDF as a background stamp to every document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-multi-line-watermark-pdffilemend.title: Add Multi‑Line Watermark with Different Font Styles using PdfFileMend
add-multi-line-watermark-pdffilemend.description: Demonstrates how to create a three‑line watermark on every PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormattedText and the AddNewLineText method to apply distinct font styles and spacing.

add-right-aligned-logo-stamp-to-pdf-page.title: Add Right-Aligned Logo Stamp to PDF Pages
add-right-aligned-logo-stamp-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to place an image stamp (logo) on every page of a PDF and align it to the right margin using Aspose.Pdf.

add-semi-transparent-png-background-stam.title: Add Semi-Transparent PNG Background Stamp to PDF
add-semi-transparent-png-background-stam.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to place a semi‑transparent PNG image as a background stamp that covers the entire page of a PDF document.

apply-multi-line-text-stamp.title: Apply Multi-Line Text Stamp with Custom Line Spacing
apply-multi-line-text-stamp.description: Demonstrates creating a formatted text stamp with multiple lines and 1.5 point extra line spacing, then applying it as a semi‑transparent background watermark to all pages of a PDF.

add-creation-date-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add Creation Date Stamp to PDF
add-creation-date-stamp-to-pdf.description: Shows how to read a PDF's creation date and place it as a text stamp in the top‑left corner of each page using Aspose.Pdf.

merge-cover-page-background-pdf.title: Merge Cover Page as Background Using PdfFileStamp
merge-cover-page-background-pdf.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileStamp together with a Stamp to place the first page of a cover PDF behind the content of another PDF, creating a merged document.

add-logo-confidential-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add Logo and Confidential Stamp to PDF
add-logo-confidential-stamp-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades to place a company logo image together with bold 'Confidential' text as a semi‑transparent background stamp on every page of a PDF document.

apply-multi-line-watermark-custom-line-h.title: Apply Multi-Line Watermark with Custom Line Height
apply-multi-line-watermark-custom-line-h.description: Demonstrates creating a stamp containing multiple lines of text with equal line spacing and applying it as a background watermark to all pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

rotate-text-stamp-90-degrees.title: Rotate Text Stamp by 90 Degrees
rotate-text-stamp-90-degrees.description: Demonstrates creating a formatted text stamp, setting its Rotation property to 90°, and applying it to a PDF using the PdfFileStamp facade.

add-footer-with-page-count.title: Add Footer with Automatic Page Count to PDF
add-footer-with-page-count.description: Shows how to use PdfFileStamp to add a footer containing the {page_count} placeholder, which Aspose.Pdf replaces with the total number of pages when the document is saved.

create-multi-page-pdf-stamp.title: Create Multi-Page PDF Stamp from Multiple PDFs
create-multi-page-pdf-stamp.description: Demonstrates combining several PDF files as stamps and applying them to a target PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileStamp facade.

add-custom-border-stamp-to-pdf-page.title: Add Custom Border Stamp to PDF Page
add-custom-border-stamp-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to use PdfContentEditor to create a square annotation with a custom border thickness and color to highlight a specific area in a PDF document.

add-rotated-image-stamp-to-first-page.title: Add Rotated Image Stamp to First Page of PDFs
add-rotated-image-stamp-to-first-page.description: Shows how to batch‑process PDF files in a directory and apply a semi‑transparent, 45‑degree rotated image stamp to the first page of each document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

apply-image-stamp-to-all-pdf-pages.title: Apply Image Stamp to All PDF Pages
apply-image-stamp-to-all-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to use PdfFileStamp and Stamp to add a single image stamp to every page of a PDF efficiently in one operation.

add-file-name-header-stamp.title: Add File Name Header Stamp to PDF
add-file-name-header-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to place a text stamp in the header of each PDF page that automatically shows the document's file name using the {FileName} placeholder.

add-background-text-stamp-30-opacity.title: Add Background Text Stamp with 30% Opacity
add-background-text-stamp-30-opacity.description: Demonstrates how to place a semi‑transparent text stamp behind the content of each page in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-rotated-text-stamp-to-odd-pages.title: Apply Rotated Text Stamp to Odd Pages
apply-rotated-text-stamp-to-odd-pages.description: Demonstrates adding a 30‑degree rotated red CONFIDENTIAL text stamp to the left margin of every odd‑numbered page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-dynamic-text-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add Dynamic Text Stamp to PDF
add-dynamic-text-stamp-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating a TextStamp with interpolated date and author, configuring its appearance, adding it to the first page, and saving the document.

add-repeating-background-image-watermark.title: Add Repeating Background Image Watermark to PDF
add-repeating-background-image-watermark.description: Demonstrates how to use a single Stamp instance to place a semi‑transparent background image on every page of a PDF, creating a repeated watermark effect.

apply-multi-line-colored-header-stamp.title: Apply Multi-Line Colored Header Stamp to PDF
apply-multi-line-colored-header-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to add a multi‑line header to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, with each line rendered in a different font color.
